steps.title: Focus on the difference
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize how the two compositions differ. The relevant notes say Live On, Heart of My Nation features a Choctaw hymn, while Cacega Ayuwipi incorporates a Haida gourd rattle.

steps.title: Exclude vague comparisons
steps.content: Choice B only identifies the two works and Redbird's profession. Choice C blends the details into general examples without assigning each one to a specific work. Choice D mentions different approaches but does not state the actual difference between the compositions. The answer is A.
